title: Support force assignments to unpacked array elements of simple types (partial #4735)
body:
Currently on master `force` and `release` statements used on unpacked array elements result in cpp compilation errors.
This PR adds support for these statements on arrays with elements of logic types and warnings in other cases.

`*__VforceEn` variable, which is array when the original variable is an array too, is initialized with a possibly nested `for` loop (one loop for each dimension). In the same way values of elements  of `*__VforceRd` array are updated.

In a case with packed types, references to variables are replaced with expressions. We can't do that in a case with unpacked arrays, because we would end up with expressions inside `AstArraySel` nodes, which result in cpp compilation errors. Instead, we need to replace `AstArraySel` nodes with expressions in which variable references have array selects applied.
